title: Validate R1 Neo SX1262 reset pin behavior before final overlay
description: Why this exists: Meshtastic r1-neo uses SX126X_RESET=38 while MeshCore muziworks_r1_neo sets P_LORA_RESET=RADIOLIB_NC despite variant.cpp labeling P1.06 as reset. What needs to be done: confirm whether Zephyr should drive P1.06 reset or leave it disconnected, using hardware test or vendor confirmation. Acceptance criteria: board overlay records the confirmed reset behavior; wrong-reset behavior has a regression/smoke test or explicit limitation.
